hero.description: Presidency University offers specialised postgraduate programmes designed to deepen knowledge, accelerate careers, and provide pathways into doctoral study.

about.title: About the Programme
about.content: Presidency University’s postgraduate portfolio is designed for graduates who want to deepen specialist knowledge, accelerate their careers, or pivot into a new field. Programmes are taught by experienced faculty alongside international visiting professors, and many include live industry projects, research components, and pathways into doctoral study. All programmes are open to international applicants.
about.note: Entry requirements, intakes, and fees vary by programme — contact the Office of International Affairs (OIA) for a personalised consultation.

schools.name: Presidency School of Computer Science and Engineering

M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)
Post Graduate Diploma in Big Data
